title: ByteTrack Algorithm
description: The wiki extensively covers `[[bot-sort-tracker]]` and the underlying `[[base-track-class]]`, but lacks a dedicated page for ByteTrack. Adding this would complete the comparative landscape of modern MOT algorithms within the Ultralytics ecosystem.
